Account.Title: Account

AddToCart.AddPlaylist: Add all tracks from playlist '{{name}}' to cart
AddToCart.OpenCartPicker: Choose a cart for this item

CartPage.Body:
We’ve fine-tuned our recommendations engine using behavior from your playlists, cart activity, and collection – alongside picks from our global DJ community and expert curators. Your recommendations are tailored to the tracks in your cart. They refresh weekly and get smarter the more you dig.

We’re just getting started, let us know what you think.
CartPage.Title: Smarter Cart Recommendations

MyRecommendations.Body:
We’ve fine-tuned our recommendations engine using behavior from your playlists, cart activity, and collection – alongside picks from our global DJ community and expert curators. Your recommendations refresh daily and get smarter the more you dig.

We’re just getting started, let us know what you think.
MyRecommendations.Title: Smarter Daily Recommendations

TrackPage.Body:
We’ve fine-tuned our recommendations engine using behavior from your playlists, cart activity, and collection – alongside picks from our global DJ community and expert curators. Your recommendations are tailored to the track you're viewing. They refresh weekly and get smarter the more you dig.

We’re just getting started, let us know what you think.
TrackPage.Title: Smarter Track Recommendations

Signup.AMobileApp: A mobile app made to find music on the go
Signup.Agree: By clicking “Continue”, you agree to our
Signup.AnExpandedCatalog: An expanded catalog including new genres
Signup.NowYouGetMore: Now you get more of everything you love, plus:
Signup.OptInNotice: By opting in you are consenting to receive music updates, exclusive offers, and product news from Beatport. You can opt out at any time.
Signup.SubscribeToBeatportNews: Subscribe to Beatport news and updates
Signup.Unsubscribe: Remember, you can unsubscribe from our emails at any time. For further info please refer to our
Signup.WelcomeIntro: Your journey into the world’s best electronic music starts here. Discover the latest releases, exclusive tracks, and the sounds that shape dance floors. Whether you need downloads for your next gig or seamless streaming in your favorite DJ software and hardware – we’ve got you covered.

Artists.description: My Beatport lets you follow your favorite artists so you can find out when they release new tracks.
Artists.header: You're not following any artists yet!

General.description: My Beatport lets you follow your favorite DJs and labels so you can find out when they release new tracks. So go follow someone!

Labels.description: My Beatport lets you follow your favorite labels so you can find out when they release new tracks.
Labels.header: You're not following any labels yet!

NoNewTracks.description: None of the artists or labels you follow have any new releases.
NoNewTracks.header: No new releases at this time!

translation.NoPurchases: You haven't made any purchases lately. Beatbot uses your purchase history to recommend tracks to you.
translation.NoRecommended: You don't have any recommended tracks!

StepIntro.Title: Take a quick tour?
StepIntro.Content: Get to know the features that help you discover, organize, and download the music you love.

StepOne.Title: My Beatport
StepOne.Content: Get personalized recommendations and new release updates based on your favorite artists and labels.

StepTwo.Title: Explore every sound
StepTwo.Content: Dive into House, Techno, Drum & Bass, and beyond – find the genres that move you.

StepThree.Title: Build and organize
StepThree.Content: Create, manage, and share playlists – perfect for your next gig or your daily soundtrack.

StepFour.Title: Discover hidden gems
StepFour.Content: Go beyond the charts to explore underground releases and fresh talent, handpicked by our team of expert curators.

StepFive.Title: Your account
StepFive.Content: Adjust your profile, streaming subscription, download preferences and audio settings.

StepSix.Title: Your purchases, ready to go
StepSix.Content: Review, manage, and purchase the music you love – everything you need for your set, all in one place.

StepSeven.Title: Listen to what the pros play
StepSeven.Content: Check out curated charts from top DJs and labels, and stay in sync with dance floors worldwide.

Subscriptions.ByDowngrading: By downgrading from {{currentPlan}} to {{newPlan}} you will lose the following features:
Subscriptions.CancelAcknowledgement: If you cancel your Beatport {{planCode}} plan you will lose access to {{featuresList}} and the ability to stream the entire Beatport catalog.
Subscriptions.CancellationGoIntoEffect: Cancellation will go into effect at the end of your current billing period on {{date}}
Subscriptions.CouponWarning: Price shown does not include coupon saving.
Subscriptions.Description: Download and listen to new, exclusive, electronic dance music and house tracks. Available on mp3 and wav at the world’s largest store for DJs.
Subscriptions.DowngradePlanConfirm: Are you sure you want to downgrade?
Subscriptions.DownloadLimitWarning: Free accounts can only download tracks up to {{maxDownloads}} times, For unlimited re-downloads subscribe to <0>Beatport Streaming</0>
Subscriptions.Expires: {{billingDate}} your subscription will expire, reactivate to keep your benefits.
Subscriptions.Feedback: Continuing to enhance Beatport and our subscription service is a priority for us. We value your insights and would be grateful if you could share your feedback with us. The survey should take no more than 5 minutes to complete.
Subscriptions.FreeTrialExpires: Free trial expires on {{nextDate}}, you will then be charged {{symbol}}{{planPrice}} / {{planBilingPeriod}} unless you cancel your subscription. A reminder email will be sent 6 days before your trial expires.
Subscriptions.NoPlan: You will no longer have high quality streaming, curated and custom playlists or your purchase history.

CommonFeatures.TraktorPlay: Free license for Traktor Play DJ software

Descriptions.BP_LINK: Best value for DJ platform integrations

Footnotes.AvailableIntegrations: CDJ-3000, CDJ-3000X, DEX3, djay (Algoriddim), DJ.Studio, DJUCED, edjing Mix, Engine DJ OS (Denon DJ, Numark), future.dj.pro, OMNIS-DUO, OPUS-QUAD, rekordbox, Serato, Traktor, Tribe XR, VirtualDJ, WeDJ, XDJ-AZ.
Footnotes.FreeAcademyAccess: Full access to Pete Tong DJ Academy Pro, free for 1 month. Includes educational content from the world's top DJs and producers. <learnMore>Learn More</learnMore>
Footnotes.LosslessAudioUnsupported: Currently not supported by the CDJ-3000, CDJ-3000X, OPUS-QUAD, OMNIS-DUO, XDJ-AZ. Flac audio quality, faster loading compared to Wav or Aiff. Only available on DJ platform integrations.
Footnotes.OfflineLibraryUnsupported: Available only on DJ platform integrations, not supported by the CDJ-3000, CDJ-3000X, OPUS-QUAD, OMNIS-DUO, XDJ-AZ, or Engine DJ OS (Denon DJ, Numark).
Footnotes.StreamingQuality: Information on Beatport Streaming quality. <learnMore>Learn More</learnMore>
Footnotes.TracktorPlayDJ: One free perpetual license for Traktor Play DJ software by Native Instruments.
